  • Overview
  • Package
  • Class
  • Tree
  • Deprecated
  • Index
  • Help
SEARCH

Deprecated API

Contents

  • Interfaces
  • Classes
  • Fields
  • Methods
  • Constructors
  • Deprecated Interfaces
    Interface
    Description
    org.apache.iceberg.aws.s3.signer.S3SignRequest
    since 1.11.0, will be removed in 1.12.0; use RemoteSignRequest instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.aws.s3.signer.S3SignResponse
    since 1.11.0, will be removed in 1.12.0; use RemoteSignResponse instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.encryption.KmsClient
    the API will be removed in v2.0.0 (replaced with KeyManagementClient interface).
    org.apache.iceberg.encryption.NativelyEncryptedFile
    will be removed in 2.0.0
    org.apache.iceberg.io.CredentialSupplier
    since 1.10.0, will be removed in 2.0.0
    org.apache.iceberg.metrics.MetricsContext.Counter
    will be removed in 2.0.0, use Counter instead.
  • Deprecated Classes
    Class
    Description
    org.apache.iceberg.aws.s3.signer.S3ObjectMapper
    since 1.11.0, will be removed in 1.12.0; use RESTObjectMapper instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.aws.s3.signer.S3SignRequestParser
    since 1.11.0, will be removed in 1.12.0; use RemoteSignRequestParser instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.aws.s3.signer.S3SignResponseParser
    since 1.11.0, will be removed in 1.12.0; use RemoteSignResponseParser instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.data.avro.DataReader
    will be removed in 1.12.0; use PlannedDataReader instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.data.BaseFileWriterFactory
    since version 1.11.0 and will be removed in 1.12.0. Use RegistryBasedFileWriterFactory
    org.apache.iceberg.data.GenericAppenderFactory
    will be removed in 1.12.0; use GenericFileWriterFactory instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.encryption.NativeFileCryptoParameters
    will be removed in 2.0.0
    org.apache.iceberg.flink.sink.FlinkAppenderFactory
    Deprecated as of 1.11.0 in favor of FlinkFileWriterFactory. This class will be removed in the 1.12.0.
    org.apache.iceberg.flink.source.FlinkSource
    since 1.7.0, will be removed in 2.0.0. Use IcebergSource instead, which implement the newer FLIP-27 source interface. This class implements the old SourceFunction that has been marked as deprecated in Flink since Aug 2023.
    org.apache.iceberg.flink.source.reader.AvroGenericRecordReaderFunction
    since 1.7.0. Will be removed in 2.0.0; use IcebergSource.forOutputType(RowDataConverter) and AvroGenericRecordConverter instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.parquet.ParquetWriteAdapter
    use ParquetWriter
    org.apache.iceberg.PartitionStats
    will be removed in 1.12.0. Use instead
    org.apache.iceberg.SystemProperties
    Use SystemConfigs instead; will be removed in 1.12.0
  • Deprecated Fields
    Field
    Description
    org.apache.iceberg.aws.s3.signer.S3V4RestSignerClient.S3_SIGNER_ENDPOINT
    since 1.11.0, will be removed in 1.12.0; use RESTCatalogProperties.SIGNER_URI instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.aws.s3.signer.S3V4RestSignerClient.S3_SIGNER_URI
    since 1.11.0, will be removed in 1.12.0; use RESTCatalogProperties.SIGNER_URI instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.gcp.bigquery.BigQueryMetastoreCatalog.GCP_LOCATION
    since 1.11.0, will be removed in 1.12.0; use BigQueryProperties.GCP_LOCATION instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.gcp.bigquery.BigQueryMetastoreCatalog.LIST_ALL_TABLES
    since 1.11.0, will be removed in 1.12.0; use BigQueryProperties.LIST_ALL_TABLES instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.gcp.bigquery.BigQueryMetastoreCatalog.PROJECT_ID
    since 1.11.0, will be removed in 1.12.0; use BigQueryProperties.PROJECT_ID instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.PartitionStatsHandler.DATA_FILE_COUNT
    will be removed in 1.12.0. Use PartitionStatistics.DATA_FILE_COUNT
    org.apache.iceberg.PartitionStatsHandler.DATA_RECORD_COUNT
    will be removed in 1.12.0. Use PartitionStatistics.DATA_RECORD_COUNT
    org.apache.iceberg.PartitionStatsHandler.DV_COUNT
    will be removed in 1.12.0. Use PartitionStatistics.DV_COUNT
    org.apache.iceberg.PartitionStatsHandler.EQUALITY_DELETE_FILE_COUNT
    will be removed in 1.12.0. Use PartitionStatistics.EQUALITY_DELETE_FILE_COUNT
    org.apache.iceberg.PartitionStatsHandler.EQUALITY_DELETE_RECORD_COUNT
    will be removed in 1.12.0. Use PartitionStatistics.EQUALITY_DELETE_RECORD_COUNT
    org.apache.iceberg.PartitionStatsHandler.LAST_UPDATED_AT
    will be removed in 1.12.0. Use PartitionStatistics.LAST_UPDATED_AT
    org.apache.iceberg.PartitionStatsHandler.LAST_UPDATED_SNAPSHOT_ID
    will be removed in 1.12.0. Use PartitionStatistics.LAST_UPDATED_SNAPSHOT_ID
    org.apache.iceberg.PartitionStatsHandler.PARTITION_FIELD_ID
    will be removed in 1.12.0. Use PartitionStatistics.EMPTY_PARTITION_FIELD
    org.apache.iceberg.PartitionStatsHandler.PARTITION_FIELD_NAME
    will be removed in 1.12.0. Use PartitionStatistics.EMPTY_PARTITION_FIELD
    org.apache.iceberg.PartitionStatsHandler.POSITION_DELETE_FILE_COUNT
    will be removed in 1.12.0. Use PartitionStatistics.POSITION_DELETE_FILE_COUNT
    org.apache.iceberg.PartitionStatsHandler.POSITION_DELETE_RECORD_COUNT
    will be removed in 1.12.0. Use PartitionStatistics.POSITION_DELETE_RECORD_COUNT
    org.apache.iceberg.PartitionStatsHandler.SPEC_ID
    will be removed in 1.12.0. Use PartitionStatistics.SPEC_ID
    org.apache.iceberg.PartitionStatsHandler.TOTAL_DATA_FILE_SIZE_IN_BYTES
    will be removed in 1.12.0. Use PartitionStatistics.TOTAL_DATA_FILE_SIZE_IN_BYTES
    org.apache.iceberg.PartitionStatsHandler.TOTAL_RECORD_COUNT
    will be removed in 1.12.0. Use PartitionStatistics.TOTAL_RECORD_COUNT
    org.apache.iceberg.rest.RESTSessionCatalog.REST_PAGE_SIZE
    will be removed in 1.12.0. Use RESTCatalogProperties.PAGE_SIZE instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.rest.RESTUtil.NAMESPACE_JOINER
    since 1.11.0, will be removed in 1.12.0; use RESTUtil.namespaceToQueryParam(Namespace)} instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.rest.RESTUtil.NAMESPACE_SPLITTER
    since 1.11.0, will be removed in 1.12.0; use RESTUtil.namespaceFromQueryParam(String) instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.SystemConfigs.NETFLIX_UNSAFE_PARQUET_ID_FALLBACK_ENABLED
    will be removed in 1.12.0; use name mapping instead
    org.apache.iceberg.TableProperties.MANIFEST_LISTS_ENABLED
    will be removed in 1.12.0, writing manifest lists is always enabled
    org.apache.iceberg.TableProperties.MANIFEST_LISTS_ENABLED_DEFAULT
    will be removed in 1.12.0, writing manifest lists is always enabled
    org.apache.iceberg.TableProperties.OBJECT_STORE_PATH
    will be removed in 2.0.0, use TableProperties.WRITE_DATA_LOCATION instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.TableProperties.WRITE_FOLDER_STORAGE_LOCATION
    will be removed in 2.0.0, use TableProperties.WRITE_DATA_LOCATION instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.util.ThreadPools.WORKER_THREAD_POOL_SIZE_PROP
    Use SystemConfigs.WORKER_THREAD_POOL_SIZE instead. will be removed in 1.12.0
    org.apache.spark.sql.catalyst.parser.extensions.IcebergSqlExtensionsLexer.tokenNames
    Use IcebergSqlExtensionsLexer.VOCABULARY instead.
    org.apache.spark.sql.catalyst.parser.extensions.IcebergSqlExtensionsParser.tokenNames
    Use IcebergSqlExtensionsParser.VOCABULARY instead.
  • Deprecated Methods
    Method
    Description
    org.apache.iceberg.avro.AvroSchemaUtil.pruneColumns(Schema, Set<Integer>, NameMapping)
    will be removed in 1.12.0; use applyNameMapping and pruneColumns(Schema, Set) instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.aws.AwsClientFactories.configureEndpoint(T, String)
    Not for public use. To configure the endpoint for a client, please use S3FileIOProperties.applyEndpointConfigurations(S3BaseClientBuilder), AwsProperties.applyGlueEndpointConfigurations(GlueClientBuilder), or AwsProperties.applyDynamoDbEndpointConfigurations(DynamoDbClientBuilder), or AwsProperties.applyKmsEndpointConfigurations(KmsClientBuilder) accordingly. It will be removed in 2.0.0
    org.apache.iceberg.aws.AwsClientFactories.configureHttpClientBuilder(String)
    Not for public use. To configure the httpClient for a client, please use HttpClientProperties.applyHttpClientConfigurations(AwsSyncClientBuilder). It will be removed in 2.0.0
    org.apache.iceberg.aws.AwsClientFactories.s3Configuration(Boolean, Boolean)
    Not for public use. To build an S3Configuration object, use S3Configuration.builder() directly. It will be removed in 2.0.0
    org.apache.iceberg.connect.Committer.start(Catalog, IcebergSinkConfig, SinkTaskContext)
    will be removed in 2.0.0. Use Committer.open(Catalog, IcebergSinkConfig, SinkTaskContext, Collection) instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.connect.Committer.stop()
    will be removed in 2.0.0. Use Committer.close(Collection) instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.connect.data.IcebergWriterResult.tableIdentifier()
    since 1.11.0, will be removed in 1.12.0; use tableReference().identifier() instead
    org.apache.iceberg.connect.events.TableReference.of(String, TableIdentifier)
    since 1.11.0, will be removed in 1.12.0; use TableReference.of(String, TableIdentifier, UUID)
    org.apache.iceberg.ContentFile.path()
    since 1.7.0, will be removed in 2.0.0; use ContentFile.location() instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.data.BaseFileWriterFactory.positionDeleteRowSchema()
    This method is deprecated as of version 1.11.0 and will be removed in 1.12.0. Position deletes that include row data are no longer supported.
    org.apache.iceberg.data.GenericFileWriterFactory.configureDataWrite(Avro.DataWriteBuilder)
    Since 1.11.0, will be removed in 1.12.0. It won't be called starting in 1.11.0 as the configuration is done by the FormatModelRegistry.
    org.apache.iceberg.data.GenericFileWriterFactory.configureDataWrite(ORC.DataWriteBuilder)
    Since 1.11.0, will be removed in 1.12.0. It won't be called starting in 1.11.0 as the configuration is done by the FormatModelRegistry.
    org.apache.iceberg.data.GenericFileWriterFactory.configureDataWrite(Parquet.DataWriteBuilder)
    Since 1.11.0, will be removed in 1.12.0. It won't be called starting in 1.11.0 as the configuration is done by the FormatModelRegistry.
    org.apache.iceberg.data.GenericFileWriterFactory.configureEqualityDelete(Avro.DeleteWriteBuilder)
    Since 1.11.0, will be removed in 1.12.0. It won't be called starting in 1.11.0 as the configuration is done by the FormatModelRegistry.
    org.apache.iceberg.data.GenericFileWriterFactory.configureEqualityDelete(ORC.DeleteWriteBuilder)
    Since 1.11.0, will be removed in 1.12.0. It won't be called starting in 1.11.0 as the configuration is done by the FormatModelRegistry.
    org.apache.iceberg.data.GenericFileWriterFactory.configureEqualityDelete(Parquet.DeleteWriteBuilder)
    Since 1.11.0, will be removed in 1.12.0. It won't be called starting in 1.11.0 as the configuration is done by the FormatModelRegistry.
    org.apache.iceberg.data.GenericFileWriterFactory.configurePositionDelete(Avro.DeleteWriteBuilder)
    Since 1.11.0, will be removed in 1.12.0. It won't be called starting in 1.11.0 as the configuration is done by the FormatModelRegistry.
    org.apache.iceberg.data.GenericFileWriterFactory.configurePositionDelete(ORC.DeleteWriteBuilder)
    Since 1.11.0, will be removed in 1.12.0. It won't be called starting in 1.11.0 as the configuration is done by the FormatModelRegistry.
    org.apache.iceberg.data.GenericFileWriterFactory.configurePositionDelete(Parquet.DeleteWriteBuilder)
    Since 1.11.0, will be removed in 1.12.0. It won't be called starting in 1.11.0 as the configuration is done by the FormatModelRegistry.
    org.apache.iceberg.data.orc.GenericOrcReaders.struct(List<OrcValueReader<?>>, Types.StructType, Map<Integer, ?>)
    Use GenericOrcReaders.struct(TypeDescription, List, Types.StructType, Map) instead. This method uses position-based binding which may cause field misalignment in MOR and lineage scenarios.
    org.apache.iceberg.deletes.PositionDelete.row()
    This method is deprecated as of version 1.11.0 and will be removed in 1.12.0. Position deletes that include row data are no longer supported.
    org.apache.iceberg.deletes.PositionDelete.set(CharSequence, long, R)
    This method is deprecated as of version 1.11.0 and will be removed in 1.12.0. Position deletes that include row data are no longer supported. Use PositionDelete.set(CharSequence, long) instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.encryption.StandardEncryptionManager.unwrapKey(ByteBuffer)
    will be removed in 1.12.0.
    org.apache.iceberg.encryption.StandardEncryptionManager.wrapKey(ByteBuffer)
    will be removed in 1.12.0.
    org.apache.iceberg.ExpireSnapshots.cleanExpiredFiles(boolean)
    since 1.11.0, will be removed in 2.0.0; use ExpireSnapshots.cleanupLevel(CleanupLevel) instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.flink.FlinkSchemaUtil.convert(TableSchema)
    will be removed in 2.0.0; use FlinkSchemaUtil.convert(ResolvedSchema) instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.flink.FlinkSchemaUtil.convert(Schema, TableSchema)
    since 1.10.0, will be removed in 2.0.0. Use FlinkSchemaUtil.convert(Schema, ResolvedSchema) instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.flink.FlinkSchemaUtil.toSchema(RowType)
    since 1.10.0, will be removed in 2.0.0. Use FlinkSchemaUtil.toResolvedSchema(RowType) instead
    org.apache.iceberg.flink.FlinkSchemaUtil.toSchema(Schema)
    since 1.10.0, will be removed in 2.0.0. Use FlinkSchemaUtil.toResolvedSchema(Schema) instead
    org.apache.iceberg.flink.maintenance.api.RewriteDataFiles.Builder.filter(Expression)
    will be removed in 1.12.0. Use RewriteDataFiles.Builder.filter(SerializableSupplier) instead
    org.apache.iceberg.flink.maintenance.api.TableMaintenance.forChangeStream(DataStream<TableChange>, TableLoader, TriggerLockFactory)
    since 1.12.0, will be removed in 2.0.0. Use TableMaintenance.forChangeStream(DataStream, TableLoader) instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.flink.maintenance.api.TableMaintenance.forTable(StreamExecutionEnvironment, TableLoader, TriggerLockFactory)
    since 1.12.0, will be removed in 2.0.0. Use TableMaintenance.forTable(StreamExecutionEnvironment, TableLoader) instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.flink.sink.dynamic.CompareSchemasVisitor.visit(Schema, Schema)
    org.apache.iceberg.flink.sink.FlinkSink.forRow(DataStream<Row>, TableSchema)
    since 1.10.0, will be removed in 2.0.0. Use FlinkSink.forRow(DataStream, ResolvedSchema) instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.flink.sink.IcebergSink.Builder.compaction(boolean)
    See rewriteDatafiles(..)
    org.apache.iceberg.flink.sink.IcebergSink.forRow(DataStream<Row>, TableSchema)
    Use IcebergSink.forRow(DataStream, ResolvedSchema) instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.flink.source.FlinkSource.Builder.properties(Map<String, String>)
    Use FlinkSource.Builder.setAll(java.util.Map<java.lang.String, java.lang.String>) instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.flink.source.IcebergSource.builder()
    since 1.7.0. Will be removed in 2.0.0; useIcebergSource.forRowData() or IcebergSource.forOutputType(RowDataConverter) instead
    org.apache.iceberg.flink.source.IcebergSource.Builder.project(TableSchema)
    since 1.10.0, will be removed in 2.0.0. Use IcebergSource.Builder.project(ResolvedSchema) instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.flink.source.IcebergSource.Builder.properties(Map<String, String>)
    will be removed in 2.0.0; use IcebergSource.Builder.setAll(java.util.Map<java.lang.String, java.lang.String>) instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.flink.source.IcebergSource.Builder.readerFunction(ReaderFunction<T>)
    since 1.7.0. Will be removed in 2.0.0; useIcebergSource.forOutputType(RowDataConverter) instead to produce output type other than RowData.
    org.apache.iceberg.flink.util.FlinkCompatibilityUtil.isPhysicalColumn(TableColumn)
    since 1.10.0, will be removed in 2.0.0.
    org.apache.iceberg.hadoop.HadoopFileIO.serializeConfWith(Function<Configuration, SerializableSupplier<Configuration>>)
    since 1.11.0, will be removed in 1.12.0.
    org.apache.iceberg.io.ContentCache.invalidateAll()
    since 1.7.0, will be removed in 1.12.0; This method does only best-effort invalidation and is susceptible to a race condition. If the caller changed the state that could be cached (perhaps files on the storage) and calls this method, there is no guarantee that the cache will not contain stale entries some time after this method returns.
    org.apache.iceberg.ManifestFiles.read(ManifestFile, FileIO)
    since 1.11.0, will be removed in 1.12.0; use ManifestFiles.read(ManifestFile, FileIO, Map) instead. Reading partition specs from manifest file metadata will not be supported for non-Avro manifest formats.
    org.apache.iceberg.ManifestFiles.readPaths(ManifestFile, FileIO)
    since 1.11.0, will be removed in 1.12.0; use ManifestFiles.readPaths(ManifestFile, FileIO, Map) instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.metrics.DefaultMetricsContext.counter(String, Class<T>, MetricsContext.Unit)
    will be removed in 2.0.0, use Counter instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.metrics.MetricsContext.counter(String, Class<T>, MetricsContext.Unit)
    will be removed in 2.0.0, use MetricsContext.counter(String, Unit) instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.metrics.MetricsContext.Counter.count()
    Use MetricsContext.Counter.value()
    org.apache.iceberg.MetricsConfig.forPositionDelete(Table)
    This method is deprecated as of version 1.11.0 and will be removed in 1.12.0. Position deletes that include row data are no longer supported. Use MetricsConfig.forPositionDelete() instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.MetricsConfig.fromProperties(Map<String, String>)
    use MetricsConfig.forTable(Table). Will be removed in 2.0.0
    org.apache.iceberg.parquet.Parquet.ReadBuilder.callInit()
    will be removed in 2.0.0; use Parquet.ReadBuilder.createReaderFunc(Function) instead
    org.apache.iceberg.parquet.Parquet.ReadBuilder.readSupport(ReadSupport<?>)
    will be removed in 2.0.0; use Parquet.ReadBuilder.createReaderFunc(Function) instead
    org.apache.iceberg.PartitionStatsHandler.readPartitionStatsFile(Schema, InputFile)
    will be removed in 1.12.0, use PartitionStatisticsScan instead
    org.apache.iceberg.PartitionStatsHandler.schema(Types.StructType, int)
    will be removed in 1.12.0. Use PartitionStatistics.schema(StructType, int) instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.rest.CatalogHandlers.loadTable(Catalog, TableIdentifier)
    since 1.11.0, will be removed in 1.12.0. Use CatalogHandlers.loadTable(Catalog, TableIdentifier, SnapshotMode) instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.rest.responses.BaseScanTaskResponse.Builder.deleteFiles()
    since 1.11.0, visibility will be reduced in 1.12.0.
    org.apache.iceberg.rest.responses.BaseScanTaskResponse.Builder.specsById()
    since 1.11.0, visibility will be reduced in 1.12.0.
    org.apache.iceberg.rest.responses.BaseScanTaskResponse.Builder.withDeleteFiles(List<DeleteFile>)
    since 1.11.0, will be removed in 1.12.0.
    org.apache.iceberg.rest.responses.BaseScanTaskResponse.Builder.withSpecsById(Map<Integer, PartitionSpec>)
    since 1.11.0, visibility will be reduced in 1.12.0.
    org.apache.iceberg.rest.responses.BaseScanTaskResponse.specsById()
    since 1.11.0, visibility will be reduced in 1.12.0.
    org.apache.iceberg.rest.RESTUtil.decodeNamespace(String)
    since 1.11.0, will be removed in 1.12.0; use RESTUtil.decodeNamespace(String, String) instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.rest.RESTUtil.encodeNamespace(Namespace)
    since 1.11.0, will be removed in 1.12.0; use RESTUtil.encodeNamespace(Namespace, String) instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.RewriteFiles.rewriteFiles(Set<DataFile>, Set<DataFile>)
    since 1.3.0, will be removed in 2.0.0
    org.apache.iceberg.RewriteFiles.rewriteFiles(Set<DataFile>, Set<DataFile>, long)
    since 1.3.0, will be removed in 2.0.0
    org.apache.iceberg.RewriteFiles.rewriteFiles(Set<DataFile>, Set<DeleteFile>, Set<DataFile>, Set<DeleteFile>)
    since 1.3.0, will be removed in 2.0.0
    org.apache.iceberg.RewriteTablePathUtil.PositionDeleteReaderWriter.writer(OutputFile, FileFormat, PartitionSpec, StructLike, Schema)
    This method is deprecated as of version 1.11.0 and will be removed in 1.12.0. Position deletes that include row data are no longer supported. Use RewriteTablePathUtil.PositionDeleteReaderWriter.writer(OutputFile, FileFormat, PartitionSpec, StructLike) instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.Snapshot.addedDataFiles(FileIO)
    will be removed in 2.0.0; use SnapshotChanges#builderFor(Table) instead
    org.apache.iceberg.Snapshot.addedDeleteFiles(FileIO)
    will be removed in 2.0.0; use SnapshotChanges#builderFor(Table) instead
    org.apache.iceberg.Snapshot.removedDataFiles(FileIO)
    will be removed in 2.0.0; use SnapshotChanges#builderFor(Table) instead
    org.apache.iceberg.Snapshot.removedDeleteFiles(FileIO)
    will be removed in 2.0.0; use SnapshotChanges#builderFor(Table) instead
    org.apache.iceberg.spark.SparkSchemaUtil.convertWithFreshIds(Schema, StructType)
    since 1.11.0, will be removed in 1.12.0
    org.apache.iceberg.spark.SparkSchemaUtil.prune(Schema, StructType, List<Expression>)
    since 1.11.0, will be removed in 1.12.0
    org.apache.iceberg.spark.SparkTableUtil.filterPartitions(List<SparkTableUtil.SparkPartition>, Map<String, String>)
    since 1.11.0, will be removed in 1.12.0
    org.apache.iceberg.spark.SparkTableUtil.getPartitions(SparkSession, String)
    since 1.11.0, will be removed in 1.12.0
    org.apache.iceberg.spark.SparkTableUtil.getPartitionsByFilter(SparkSession, String, String)
    since 1.11.0, will be removed in 1.12.0
    org.apache.iceberg.spark.SparkTableUtil.getPartitionsByFilter(SparkSession, TableIdentifier, Expression)
    since 1.11.0, will be removed in 1.12.0
    org.apache.iceberg.spark.SparkTableUtil.importSparkPartitions(SparkSession, List<SparkTableUtil.SparkPartition>, Table, PartitionSpec, String)
    since 1.11.0, will be removed in 1.12.0
    org.apache.iceberg.spark.SparkTableUtil.importSparkPartitions(SparkSession, List<SparkTableUtil.SparkPartition>, Table, PartitionSpec, String, boolean)
    since 1.11.0, will be removed in 1.12.0
    org.apache.iceberg.spark.SparkTableUtil.importSparkTable(SparkSession, TableIdentifier, Table, String, boolean)
    since 1.11.0, will be removed in 1.12.0
    org.apache.iceberg.spark.SparkTableUtil.importSparkTable(SparkSession, TableIdentifier, Table, String, int)
    since 1.11.0, will be removed in 1.12.0
    org.apache.iceberg.spark.SparkTableUtil.importSparkTable(SparkSession, TableIdentifier, Table, String, Map<String, String>, boolean)
    since 1.11.0, will be removed in 1.12.0
    org.apache.iceberg.spark.SparkTableUtil.partitionDF(SparkSession, String)
    since 1.11.0, will be removed in 1.12.0
    org.apache.iceberg.spark.SparkTableUtil.partitionDFByFilter(SparkSession, String, String)
    since 1.11.0, will be removed in 1.12.0
    org.apache.iceberg.TableScan.appendsAfter(long)
    since 1.0.0, will be removed in 2.0.0; use Table.newIncrementalAppendScan() instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.TableScan.appendsBetween(long, long)
    since 1.0.0, will be removed in 2.0.0; use Table.newIncrementalAppendScan() instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.transforms.Transform.apply(S)
    use Transform.bind(Type) instead; will be removed in 2.0.0
    org.apache.iceberg.transforms.Transform.toHumanString(T)
    use Transform.toHumanString(Type, Object) instead; will be removed in 2.0.0
    org.apache.iceberg.transforms.Transforms.bucket(Type, int)
    use Transforms.bucket(int) instead; will be removed in 2.0.0
    org.apache.iceberg.transforms.Transforms.day(Type)
    use Transforms.day() instead; will be removed in 2.0.0
    org.apache.iceberg.transforms.Transforms.fromString(Type, String)
    use Transforms.identity() instead; will be removed in 2.0.0
    org.apache.iceberg.transforms.Transforms.hour(Type)
    use Transforms.hour() instead; will be removed in 2.0.0
    org.apache.iceberg.transforms.Transforms.identity(Type)
    use Transforms.identity() instead; will be removed in 2.0.0
    org.apache.iceberg.transforms.Transforms.month(Type)
    use Transforms.month() instead; will be removed in 2.0.0
    org.apache.iceberg.transforms.Transforms.truncate(Type, int)
    use Transforms.truncate(int) instead; will be removed in 2.0.0
    org.apache.iceberg.transforms.Transforms.year(Type)
    use Transforms.year() instead; will be removed in 2.0.0
    org.apache.iceberg.transforms.UnknownTransform.apply(S)
    will be removed in 2.0.0; use UnknownTransform.bind(Type) instead
    org.apache.iceberg.types.Types.NestedField.Builder.withInitialDefault(Object)
    will be removed in 2.0.0; use Types.NestedField.Builder.withInitialDefault(Literal) instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.types.Types.NestedField.Builder.withWriteDefault(Object)
    will be removed in 2.0.0; use Types.NestedField.Builder.withWriteDefault(Literal) instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.types.Types.NestedField.of(int, boolean, String, Type)
    will be removed in 2.0.0; use Types.NestedField.builder() instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.types.Types.NestedField.of(int, boolean, String, Type, String)
    will be removed in 2.0.0; use Types.NestedField.builder() instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.types.Types.NestedField.withFieldId(int)
    will be removed in 2.0.0; use Types.NestedField.Builder.withId(int) instead
    org.apache.iceberg.types.TypeUtil.SchemaVisitor.variant()
    will be removed in 2.0.0; use TypeUtil.SchemaVisitor.variant(Types.VariantType) instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.UpdateStatistics.setStatistics(long, StatisticsFile)
    since 1.8.0, will be removed in 2.0.0, use UpdateStatistics.setStatistics(StatisticsFile).
    org.apache.iceberg.util.SnapshotUtil.newFiles(Long, long, Function<Long, Snapshot>, FileIO)
    will be removed in 1.12.0, use SnapshotChanges with SnapshotUtil.ancestorsBetween(long, Long, Function) instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.util.SnapshotUtil.newFilesBetween(Long, long, Function<Long, Snapshot>, FileIO)
    will be removed in 1.12.0, use SnapshotChanges with SnapshotUtil.ancestorsBetween(long, Long, Function) instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.util.TableScanUtil.hasDeletes(CombinedScanTask)
    since 1.11.0 and will be removed in 1.12.0
    org.apache.iceberg.util.TableScanUtil.hasEqDeletes(CombinedScanTask)
    since 1.11.0 and will be removed in 1.12.0
    org.apache.iceberg.util.ThreadPools.newWorkerPool(String)
    will be removed in 1.12.0. Use ThreadPools.newExitingWorkerPool(String, int) for long-lived thread pools that require a shutdown hook, or ThreadPools.newFixedThreadPool(String, int) for short-lived thread pools where you manage the lifecycle.
    org.apache.iceberg.util.ThreadPools.newWorkerPool(String, int)
    will be removed in 1.12.0. Use ThreadPools.newExitingWorkerPool(String, int) for long-lived thread pools that require a shutdown hook, or ThreadPools.newFixedThreadPool(String, int) for short-lived thread pools where you manage the lifecycle.
    org.apache.spark.sql.catalyst.parser.extensions.IcebergSqlExtensionsLexer.getTokenNames()
    org.apache.spark.sql.catalyst.parser.extensions.IcebergSqlExtensionsParser.getTokenNames()
  • Deprecated Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    org.apache.iceberg.connect.data.IcebergWriterResult(TableIdentifier, List<DataFile>, List<DeleteFile>, Types.StructType)
    since 1.11.0, will be removed in 1.12.0; use IcebergWriterResult(TableReference, List, List, StructType) instead
    org.apache.iceberg.connect.events.TableReference(String, List<String>, String)
    since 1.11.0, will be removed in 1.12.0; use TableReference.of(String, TableIdentifier, UUID).
    org.apache.iceberg.data.avro.RawDecoder(Schema, Function<Schema, DatumReader<?>>, Schema)
    will be removed in 1.12.0; use RawDecoder.create(org.apache.iceberg.Schema, Function, Schema) instead
    org.apache.iceberg.data.BaseFileWriterFactory(Table, FileFormat, Schema, SortOrder, FileFormat, int[], Schema, SortOrder, Schema)
    org.apache.iceberg.data.GenericAppenderFactory(Table, Schema, PartitionSpec, Map<String, String>, int[], Schema, Schema)
    This constructor is deprecated as of version 1.11.0 and will be removed in 1.12.0. Position deletes that include row data are no longer supported. Use GenericAppenderFactory(Table, Schema, PartitionSpec, Map, int[], Schema) instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.deletes.PositionDeleteWriter(FileAppender<? extends StructLike>, FileFormat, String, PartitionSpec, StructLike, EncryptionKeyMetadata)
    since 1.11.0, will be updated in 1.12.0 to accept FileAppender<PositionDelete<T>> instead of FileAppender<? extends StructLike>.
    org.apache.iceberg.encryption.AesGcmInputFile(InputFile, byte[], byte[])
    will be removed in 2.0.0 This API does not receive file length, and is therefore not safe
    org.apache.iceberg.encryption.StandardEncryptionManager(String, int, KeyManagementClient)
    will be removed in 1.12.0.
    org.apache.iceberg.flink.IcebergTableSink(TableLoader, TableSchema, ReadableConfig, Map<String, String>)
    since 1.10.0, will be removed in 2.0.0. Use IcebergTableSink(TableLoader, ResolvedSchema, ReadableConfig, Map) instead
    org.apache.iceberg.flink.sink.FlinkAppenderFactory(Table, Schema, RowType, Map<String, String>, PartitionSpec, int[], Schema, Schema)
    This constructor is deprecated as of version 1.11.0 and will be removed in 1.12.0. Position deletes that include row data are no longer supported. Use FlinkAppenderFactory(Table, Schema, RowType, Map, PartitionSpec, int[], Schema) instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.hadoop.HadoopFileIO(SerializableSupplier<Configuration>)
    since 1.11.0, will be removed in 1.12.0; use HadoopFileIO(Configuration) instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.orc.OrcValueReaders.StructReader(List<OrcValueReader<?>>, Types.StructType, Map<Integer, ?>)
    Use StructReader(TypeDescription, List, Types.StructType, Map) instead. This constructor uses position-based binding which may cause field misalignment in MOR scenarios. This doesn't work lineage scenarios.
    org.apache.iceberg.rest.requests.PlanTableScanRequest.Builder()
    since 1.11.0, visibility will be reduced in 1.12.0; use PlanTableScanRequest.builder() instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.rest.ResourcePaths(String)
    since 1.11.0, will be made private in 1.12.0; use ResourcePaths.forCatalogProperties(Map) instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.rest.responses.PlanTableScanResponse.Builder()
    since 1.11.0, visibility will be reduced in 1.12.0; use PlanTableScanResponse.builder() instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.spark.SparkReadConf(SparkSession, Table, String, CaseInsensitiveStringMap)
    since 1.11.0, will be removed in 1.12.0. Use SparkReadConf(SparkSession, Table, CaseInsensitiveStringMap) instead.
    org.apache.iceberg.spark.SparkWriteConf(SparkSession, Table, String, CaseInsensitiveStringMap)
    since 1.11.0, will be removed in 1.12.0. Use SparkWriteConf(SparkSession, Table, CaseInsensitiveStringMap) instead.
